description: stdlib hashmap workload with u64 keys (in [0, 2^53) for JS-safety). 3 entry points (insert/lookup/delete) exercise std HashMap/unordered_map/Map. Iter-dependent checksums; per-entry reset companion exports manage state.

ioContract.fixtureLayout: N pairs of (u64_key_le ∈ [0, 2^53), u64_value_le ∈ [0, 2^32)); 16N bytes total. Keys constrained to JS-safe range; values constrained for JS-safe lookup sum.
ioContract.iterSemantics: Iter-dependent. expectedChecksum валиден только для N = innerIterations[size].
ioContract.stateModel: Map state persists between run() calls. Per-entry <entry>_reset: insert→clear; lookup→no-op; delete→clear+refill from stored pairs.
ioContract.outputLayout: Single scalar checksum: insert→map.size(); lookup→Σ values; delete→Σ removed values.
